title: Endeavor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the Alliance frigate|[[Endeavor (disambiguation)|other starships named ''Endeavor'']]}}
The '''''Endeavor''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that challenged the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Malevolent]]'' to an evenly matched [[Battle between the Malevolent and the Endeavor|duel]].

==Behind the scenes==
While the occurrence of the space battle depicted in this mission, as well as the participants, was C-canon within the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity, the outcome depends on the actions of the player and is therefore indeterminate. For lack of other canonical information, it should be assumed that the battle had no lasting effect (such as the destruction of either starship).

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
